title: Calm upgrade runway
note: Great block for polishing documentation, naming, and release notes.

title: Deep work thermal
note: Prime slot for shipping heavier features with fewer context switches.

title: People-first loop
note: Best moment to send updates, replies, and project summaries.

title: Exploration drift
note: Use this slot for trying unknown tools and collecting future bets.

title: Maintenance glide
note: Smooth time for cleanup, dependency updates, and routine checks.

title: Narrative drafting surge
note: Strong creative momentum for essays, changelogs, and launch copy.

title: Prototype pressure pocket
note: Ideal for pushing first versions of new interactions before polish.

title: Atlas curation breeze
note: Great for organizing structure, labels, and navigation clarity.

title: Outreach thermals
note: Best for concise updates, release announcements, and follow-ups.
